components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #fff; color: #475569; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f8fafc; }

components.name: Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; color: #1e293b; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #818cf8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #818cf8; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; }

components.name: Badge Success
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ecfdf5; color: #059669; }

components.name: Card
components.html:
Security Health

Device compliance overview and policy status.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #475569; }

narrative.overview: FreeCloud's visual system is designed for the IT admin who manages 10 to 10,000 devices from a browser window — seated, multi-monitor, under deadline pressure to offboard a departing employee or investigate a compliance failure. Every pixel either serves the task or is removed. The interface is restrained, technical, and trustworthy: slate neutrals carry structure, a single indigo accent signals action, and semantic color (green/red/amber/blue) is reserved exclusively for state and meaning — never decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color: one cool indigo accent on a cool slate neutral scale. ≤10% accent coverage per screen.
Single font family (Inter) across all roles — no display/body pairing.
Flat-by-default elevation. Cards use a thin border (1px #e2e8f0) and a minimal shadow (0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05)).
Consistent page rhythm: title + subtitle → error banner → search/filter → content.
Dark mode with prefers-color-scheme auto-detection plus manual toggle.

rules.name: The Restraint Rule
rules.body: The indigo accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Green, red, amber, and blue are reserved exclusively for state. They never appear as decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction or semantic context.

dos: Do use the indigo accent exactly once per viewport section.
Do use semantic colors consistently across every screen.
Do follow the page rhythm: title + subtitle → error banner → search/filter → content.
Do use focus-visible:ring-2 on every interactive element.
Do provide dark mode variants for every component.
donts: Don't place gray text (text-slate-400, #94a3b8) on white backgrounds for body copy.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring easing.
Don't rely on color as the only indicator of state.
